sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gamlapi a mawhna khuamial gam sung-ah,
Mi tul le then gam mang in om uh hi;
Kua pai ding a
Gupkhiatna thu va gen ding,
Jesuh en in, gimna ding ngaihsun
ke’n.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: “Vangliatna kei tung hong pia zo!”
Vangliatna kei tung
hong pia zo!
Vak kawikawi unla, Lungdam Thu va gen un,
Note tawh ka om khawm tawntung ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khua dak leci’n kong honsa in hong ngak hi,
Khazih galkapte aw pai in lut
un;
Tha neih zah teng gawm in kikhen thang loin,
Thupha hilh in mawh na kol va sut
un.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: “Banghang note si zenzen ding” hong ci-in,
Pasian hong sapna thu va
ko sawn un;
Hotkhiatna le hinna na ngah nadingin,
Jesuh si in hong tan zo va ci
un.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Pa Pasian aw, hong tung sak mengmeng ta in,
Minam cin in Na min phat nading
hun,
Hotkhiatna la lungdamna tawh kiko in,
Halelujah, Topa kumpi phat un.
